<?php

/**
 * @file
 * Fixture: rendering an unrelated variable must NOT be flagged.
 *
 * The pattern only targets render($build); rendering some other element is
 * not what this grep is looking for.
 */

function my_module_preprocess_node(array &$variables): void {
  $element = $variables['content'];
  $variables['content_html'] = \Drupal::service('renderer')->render($element);
}
